creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This does not build with go newer than 1.8, see:

gmake[1]: Entering directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/cockroach/work/cockroach-v1.0.6/src/github.com/cockroachdb/cockroach'
build/common.mk:110: *** "go1\.8.* required (see CONTRIBUTING.md): go version go1.9.1 freebsd/amd64".  Stop.

OTOH cockroach 1.1 has been released very recently. Maybe drop the update to 1.0.6 and move straight to 1.1 with a new patch?
